hd_description: Laptop hardware issues including broken screens, battery problems, docking stations, and replacements
Desktop workstation issues including tower units, all-in-one PCs, and related peripherals
Printer and scanner issues including paper jams, toner replacement, driver problems, and network printing
Monitor and display issues including flickering, dead pixels, cable adapters, and multi-monitor setup
Desk phone and conference room phone issues including VoIP handsets and headsets
Requests to install new software or applications on a company-managed device
Application crashes, unexpected errors, performance issues, and software bugs requiring investigation
Software license requests, renewals, true-ups, and compliance inquiries
Requests for software updates, security patches, or version upgrades
VPN connection failures, split-tunneling issues, and remote access configuration
Wireless connectivity issues in office locations including guest network access
General internet connectivity problems, DNS issues, and bandwidth concerns
Reset a forgotten or expired Active Directory, Entra ID, or application-specific password
Unlock a user account that has been locked due to too many failed login attempts
Request access to a shared drive, SharePoint site, application role, or security group
Issues with Microsoft Outlook including sync errors, calendar problems, and profile configuration
Microsoft Teams issues including call quality, meeting problems, chat sync, and channel management
Requests to create, modify, or delete email distribution lists and shared mailboxes
